description: A Benz sedan viewed from the diagonal in normal daytime light (image appears clear). The vehicle shows new wear with tinted flat windows. It features off oval headlights and angular taillights, complemented by a hexagonal grille with rounded edges. The clean sloped roof sits above new medium street tires with intact bumpers. Side mirrors are intact. License plate is visible. Spoiler is not present. Roof rack is not present. Exhaust system features hidden pipes.
